case_title: FRANCES FORBES THOMPSON VS. ALLISON OMBRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $270.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, FRANCES FORBES AS TO DEFENDANT OMBRES, ALLISON PERFECT PIGMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 170.00 - SERVED OCT-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OMBRES, ALLISON PERFECT PIGMENT
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
